article_meta.title: US News exclusive ICE agent who opened fire on Renee Good was dragged, hospitalized by illegal migrant driver last year

reasoning: Classification direction is correct with strong, clear right-leaning signals and appropriately high confidence. However, the response commits an attribution violation by citing quoted source language ('mob of agitators') as evidence and also violates the required output format by wrapping JSON in code fences. Evidence otherwise references several valid authorial choices (terminology, framing, selection of stats, sympathetic imagery) but not always with precise textual quotes from the author's prose.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Labeling it Right fits the article’s clear pro-ICE, law-and-order framing and loaded authorial wording; at worst it’s one step from Lean Right.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: Signals are overt and consistent; 0.92 suits the strength of bias.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Mix of valid authorial indicators (terminology, framing, stats selection, sympathetic imagery) but includes quoted-source language as evidence, breaching attribution rules; some evidence is general rather than text-specific.
